title: AN ACT AMENDING GROUP III, PARAGRAPH "ah," FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, BY ADDING THERETO A NEW ITEM TO BE KNOWN AS ITEM (49).

chunks.text:
H. No. 1157 / 57 OG No. 4, 623 (January 23, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2738, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT AMENDING GROUP III, PARAGRAPH "ah," FOR MOUNTAIN PROVINCE, SECTION THREE OF REPUBLIC ACT NUMBERED FOURTEEN HUNDRED ELEVEN, BY ADDING THERETO A NEW ITEM TO BE KNOWN AS ITEM (49).

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. Group III, paragraph "ah," for Mountain Province, Section three of Republic Act Numbered Fourteen hundred eleven is amended by adding thereto the following new item:

"(49) Namilangan Barrio School building, Potiaâ

Construction of three rooms P6, 000.00."

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
